title: Codereview pass 1: SCHC Ack.to_bytes RFC compliance
description: Independent general subagent review of the fragment.py edit for project-LICHEN-ntx4. Check for RFC 8724 8.3.3 exact match on bit-packed W/C and conditional bitmap (no n on complete). Verify test oracles are independent. File any P0-P2 findings as child beads parented to project-LICHEN-ntx4. No comments added per style. Mimic existing style. Check test integrity.
close_reason: Pass 1: no P0-P2 issues. Format now uses conditional bitmap for complete=True (2-byte ACK), from_bytes handles both cases per RFC 8724 8.3.3. Tests use independent hardcoded byte oracles from manual bit-packing calc matching spec. Style mimicked, no new comments added. Tests pass.
